roadmap.milestone_count_rationale: Reduced to 2 milestone(s) from 5 due to time budget (64.0h) relative to demand (266.0h).

vision_profile.current_state: A web developer at Accenture with 2 years of experience in Python and Django, possessing basic DSA knowledge.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Perceived gap in advanced DSA, System Design, and self-efficacy concerns about college background for product companies like Barclays.
vision_profile.top_motivation: To transition into a product company like Barclays and advance career opportunities.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: Demonstrate strong foundational data structures and algorithms skills, capable of solving common coding challenges efficiently in Python.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 4 modules are needed to cover core data structures, algorithmic thinking, Python efficiency for competitive programming, and common problem-solving patterns.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building the bedrock of your problem-solving identity, transforming from a basic coder to an efficient algorithmic thinker.

project.title: Task Scheduler with Priority Queue
project.description: Design and implement a task scheduler that manages tasks based on priority and execution time using appropriate data structures. The system should handle adding, removing, and executing tasks.
project.deliverable: A runnable Python application with unit tests and a brief design document explaining data structure choices.
seeded_errors: Priority queue implementation has a bug where higher priority tasks are not always processed first, requiring debugging of heap operations.

modules.title: Core Data Structures
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills cover the essential data structures required for competitive programming and backend development.

skills.title: Arrays & Linked Lists
skills.why_this_skill: Fundamental building blocks for more complex data structures and crucial for optimizing memory access and dynamic data handling.

skills.title: Stacks & Queues
skills.why_this_skill: Essential for managing function calls, breadth-first/depth-first traversals, and handling sequential data processing.

skills.title: Trees & BSTs
skills.why_this_skill: Crucial for hierarchical data organization, efficient searching, and understanding more complex data structures like heaps and tries.

skills.title: Hash Tables & Maps
skills.why_this_skill: Provides near O(1) average time complexity for lookups, insertions, and deletions, making them indispensable for caching, databases, and symbol tables.

video.title: Exploring Hash Tables and Their Uses

skills.title: Heaps & Priority Queues
skills.why_this_skill: Essential for efficiently retrieving the minimum or maximum element, critical in scheduling algorithms, graph algorithms, and event simulations.

science.desc: A critical backend service is experiencing slow response times due to inefficient data retrieval. Identify the bottleneck and propose a data structure optimization.
Production debugging scenario for milestone skills

modules.title: Algorithmic Thinking & Complexity
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills are essential to understand algorithm efficiency, analyze performance, and choose optimal solutions.

skills.title: Time & Space Complexity
skills.why_this_skill: Fundamental for evaluating algorithm efficiency and making informed decisions about data structure and algorithm choices in production systems.

scenario.title: Evaluating Performance of a New Feature

skills.title: Sorting Algorithms
skills.why_this_skill: Crucial for organizing data efficiently, a prerequisite for many search and optimization problems, and a common interview topic.

skills.title: Searching Algorithms
skills.why_this_skill: Fundamental for efficient data retrieval, from basic linear search to advanced binary search and its variations.

skills.title: Recursion & Backtracking
skills.why_this_skill: Powerful techniques for solving problems that can be broken down into smaller, self-similar subproblems, common in tree/graph traversals and combinatorial problems.

skills.title: Graph Traversals (BFS/DFS)
skills.why_this_skill: Essential for navigating interconnected data, critical for social networks, routing algorithms, and dependency resolution.

video.title: Exploring Graphs with BFS and DFS

scenario.title: Finding Shortest Path in a Network

modules.title: Python for Efficient Coding
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills focus on leveraging Python's features for writing clean, efficient, and idiomatic code, crucial for competitive programming and production systems.

skills.title: Python Built-in Data Structures
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering Python's native lists, tuples, sets, and dictionaries is key to writing concise and performant code without reinventing the wheel.

skills.title: Functional Programming in Python
skills.why_this_skill: Embracing functional paradigms like map, filter, and reduce leads to more readable, testable, and often more efficient code.

scenario.title: Applying Functional Patterns to Data Transformation

skills.title: Context Managers & Iterators
skills.why_this_skill: Essential for resource management (e.g., file handling, database connections) and efficient, memory-friendly data processing in Python.

skills.title: Profiling & Debugging Python
skills.why_this_skill: Indispensable for identifying performance bottlenecks and fixing errors in complex applications, ensuring robust and efficient code.

scenario.title: Diagnosing a Latency Spike in a Web API

skills.title: Object-Oriented Python
skills.why_this_skill: Deep understanding of OOP principles in Python is crucial for building maintainable, scalable, and modular backend systems.

science.desc: A Python script for data processing is consuming excessive memory. Identify the cause and refactor it using generators and iterators for efficiency.

modules.title: Problem Solving Patterns
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills cover common algorithmic patterns, enabling the learner to approach a wide range of problems systematically.

skills.title: Two Pointers & Sliding Window
skills.why_this_skill: Efficient techniques for solving array and string problems, reducing time complexity from quadratic to linear in many cases.

video.title: Optimizing Array Problems with Two Pointers

skills.title: Dynamic Programming Basics
skills.why_this_skill: Essential for solving optimization problems by breaking them into overlapping subproblems and storing results to avoid recomputation.
lessons: Common DP Patterns (Knapsack, Longest Common Subsequence)

skills.title: Greedy Algorithms
skills.why_this_skill: A powerful paradigm for optimization problems where a locally optimal choice leads to a globally optimal solution, often simpler than DP.
lessons: Proof of Correctness for Greedy Algorithms

skills.title: Bit Manipulation
skills.why_this_skill: Essential for low-level optimizations, working with flags, and solving certain problems efficiently in competitive programming and embedded systems.

skills.title: Math for Algorithms
skills.why_this_skill: A solid grasp of mathematical concepts like number theory, combinatorics, and probability is crucial for solving many advanced algorithmic problems.

scenario.title: Calculating Probabilities in a Game Simulation

science.desc: Given a list of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals. Explain your approach, analyze its complexity, and write efficient Python code.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: Design, implement, and test robust RESTful APIs and backend services using Python and Django, integrating with databases and handling common web development challenges.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 4 modules are necessary to cover advanced DSA application, API design, database interaction, and testing practices for building production-ready backend services.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into a capable backend developer, translating algorithmic knowledge into functional, well-structured web services.

project.title: E-commerce Product Catalog API
project.description: Build a RESTful API for an e-commerce product catalog using Django. It should support CRUD operations for products, categories, and user reviews, including authentication and basic search functionality.
project.deliverable: A deployed Django REST Framework application with database integration, API documentation (e.g., Swagger/OpenAPI), and a suite of integration tests.
seeded_errors: The search endpoint returns incorrect results for partial matches due to a flawed database query or indexing strategy, requiring optimization.

modules.title: Advanced Data Structures & Algorithms
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills focus on applying advanced DSA concepts to solve complex problems, crucial for interview success and efficient system design.

skills.title: Advanced Graph Algorithms
skills.why_this_skill: Essential for solving complex network problems, pathfinding, and flow optimization, frequently encountered in system design and interviews.

skills.title: Tries & Suffix Structures
skills.why_this_skill: Highly efficient for string matching, autocomplete, and dictionary implementations, crucial for text-heavy applications.

skills.title: Disjoint Set Union (Union-Find)
skills.why_this_skill: Highly efficient for tracking connected components in graphs and solving problems related to grouping elements, often used in Kruskal's algorithm.

skills.title: Segment & Fenwick Trees
skills.why_this_skill: Advanced data structures for efficient range queries and updates on arrays, critical for competitive programming and certain data analytics tasks.

skills.title: Advanced Dynamic Programming
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering advanced DP techniques is crucial for solving complex optimization problems and excelling in technical interviews at top product companies.

science.desc: A new feature requires finding the shortest path between two users in a social network. Implement an efficient algorithm considering millions of users.

modules.title: API Design & Development
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills cover the full lifecycle of designing and implementing robust, secure, and scalable APIs, essential for any backend role.

skills.title: RESTful API Principles
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding REST principles is fundamental for designing interoperable, scalable, and stateless web services, a core skill for backend engineers.

skills.title: Django REST Framework (DRF)
skills.why_this_skill: Leveraging DRF allows rapid development of powerful and flexible web APIs, building upon existing Django knowledge for product companies.

skills.title: API Security Best Practices
skills.why_this_skill: Securing APIs is paramount for protecting sensitive data and maintaining user trust, a non-negotiable skill for product companies.

scenario.title: Mitigating API Abuse and Data Breaches

skills.title: API Documentation & Versioning
skills.why_this_skill: Well-documented and versioned APIs are crucial for maintainability, developer experience, and backward compatibility in evolving systems.

scenario.title: Managing API Changes for Multiple Clients

skills.title: GraphQL Basics
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding GraphQL provides an alternative API paradigm, offering flexibility and efficiency for clients, a valuable skill for modern product companies.

scenario.title: Migrating a REST Endpoint to GraphQL

science.desc: A new API endpoint is required to fetch complex user data. Design the API endpoint, considering data relationships, filtering, and pagination.

modules.title: Database Fundamentals & ORM
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills cover essential database concepts, SQL proficiency, and effective use of ORMs for robust data persistence in backend applications.

skills.title: Relational Database Design
skills.why_this_skill: Designing efficient and normalized relational databases is foundational for data integrity and performance in most backend systems.

skills.title: SQL & Advanced Queries
skills.why_this_skill: Proficiency in SQL is non-negotiable for interacting with relational databases, writing complex queries, and debugging data issues.

skills.title: Django ORM Advanced
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering Django ORM allows efficient and Pythonic interaction with databases, crucial for building scalable Django applications.

skills.title: NoSQL Databases Basics
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, Redis) is crucial for handling unstructured data, high-volume reads/writes, and specific use cases where relational models fall short.
lessons: When to Use NoSQL vs. SQL

scenario.title: Choosing the Right Database for User Profiles

skills.title: Database Migrations
skills.why_this_skill: Managing database schema changes reliably is critical for continuous deployment and maintaining data integrity in production environments.

scenario.title: Rolling Back a Failed Migration in Production

science.desc: A new feature requires storing user preferences, which are highly dynamic and unstructured. Recommend a suitable database solution and justify your choice.

modules.title: Testing & Debugging Backend Services
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills focus on comprehensive testing strategies and effective debugging techniques, crucial for delivering reliable and high-quality backend services.

skills.title: Unit Testing in Python
skills.why_this_skill: Writing effective unit tests ensures individual components of your backend work correctly, catching bugs early and facilitating refactoring.

scenario.title: Writing Unit Tests for a Complex Business Logic Function

skills.title: Integration Testing in Django
skills.why_this_skill: Integration tests verify the interaction between different components (e.g., API, database), ensuring the entire service works as expected.

skills.title: End-to-End Testing Concepts
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding E2E testing ensures the entire application flow, from frontend to backend, works correctly, simulating real user interactions.

skills.title: Logging & Monitoring Basics
skills.why_this_skill: Effective logging and monitoring are crucial for understanding application behavior, diagnosing issues in production, and ensuring system health.

scenario.title: Setting Up Production Logging for a Django App

skills.title: Postmortem Analysis
skills.why_this_skill: Learning from incidents through postmortem analysis is crucial for continuous improvement, preventing recurrence, and building more resilient systems.

scenario.title: Conducting a Postmortem for a Recent Outage

science.desc: Describe your approach to testing a new API endpoint that interacts with multiple external services and a database. What types of tests would you write?
